checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: 1 trigger: polling every 5 minutes with valid cron */5

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity >50 words. Instructions >200 words with 13 numbered steps covering the full publishing pipeline. Tool guidance with Notion blocks API, GitHub Trees API, Slack postMessage. Three examples (new page, updated page, cross-linked). Comprehensive error handling.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request mapped to Notion v1, GitHub REST v3, Slack Web API. Specific endpoints for blocks, trees, blobs, pages. file_read/write for published_state.json. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Single 5-minute polling trigger. Adequate but template could benefit from a manual trigger for on-demand publishing and a webhook for Notion updates.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: Notion, GitHub, Slack all have complete connector definitions with credential fields and detailed setup instructions.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: published_state.json tracks pages with IDs, timestamps, URLs, SHAs, and images. Well-documented state schema in the prompt.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Notion rate limits and expired image URLs, GitHub commit conflicts and build failures, Slack errors, partial failure recovery with idempotent operation, cascade failure detection (3+ page threshold).

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 use_case_flows covered: primary publishing pipeline, image processing with deduplication, internal link resolution.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Replaces 4 automation workflows. Full Notion-to-GitHub Pages pipeline with bidirectional sync, image handling, and deployment verification.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Standard APIs. Notion blocks API, GitHub Trees API for atomic commits, Slack Block Kit. All connectors have builtin definitions.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Content structure understanding, cross-document link resolution, image deduplication by SHA, idempotent operation with state tracking. Significant reasoning beyond simple automation.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: Adoption questions cover DB ID, repo owner/name, Slack channel, base URL, and auto-update toggle. All genuinely necessary for operation.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Notion DB ID has empty default (mandatory input). GitHub repo owner/name have placeholder defaults. Slack channel and base URL have reasonable defaults.

issues: No adoption_questions existed before fix - Notion DB ID, GitHub repo details, Slack channel, base URL needed user-specific configuration
Only one trigger type (polling) - could benefit from a manual trigger for on-demand publishing

template: Added 6 adoption_questions: notion_database_id, github_repo_owner, github_repo_name, slack_docs_channel, docs_base_url, auto_update_notion_status
